description: Consolidate all storage into IndexedDB by extending NeuronDB, replacing chrome.storage.local and localStorage entirely. Cross-context sync via BroadcastChannel API.

userStories.title: Add config and preferences stores to NeuronDB
userStories.description: Extend NeuronDB with new object stores for configuration and preferences so they can be persisted without chrome.storage.local.
acceptanceCriteria: Bump DB_VERSION to 2 in neuron-db.js
Add config object store (keyPath: key) for storing configuration entries
Add preferences object store (keyPath: key) for lightweight preferences
Handle upgrade callback properly so existing stores (demandas, concluidas, metadata) are preserved
Add CRUD methods: getConfig(key), setConfig(key, value), getPreference(key), setPreference(key, value)
All new methods are async and use the existing init() pattern
Typecheck/lint passes

userStories.title: Implement BroadcastChannel synchronization layer
userStories.description: Create a cross-context notification system using BroadcastChannel to replace chrome.storage.onChanged.
acceptanceCriteria: Create NeuronSync module that wraps BroadcastChannel with channel name 'neuron-sync'
Expose broadcast(changeType, key, newValue) to send change notifications
Expose onConfigChange(callback) to subscribe to config changes
Expose onPreferenceChange(callback) to subscribe to preference changes
setConfig() and setPreference() automatically broadcast after writing to IndexedDB
Listeners are properly cleaned up when calling returned unsubscribe() function
Works across extension contexts
Typecheck/lint passes

userStories.title: Migrate options page to use NeuronDB
userStories.description: Replace chrome.storage.local usage in options page with NeuronDB.
acceptanceCriteria: options.js: Replace chrome.storage.local.get with NeuronDB.getConfig
options.js: Replace chrome.storage.local.set with NeuronDB.setConfig
Remove chrome.storage.onChanged listener; replace with NeuronSync equivalent
Ensure idb.min.js and neuron-db.js are loaded in options.html
Saving config still updates all other open extension contexts in real time
Typecheck/lint passes

userStories.title: Migrate popup to use NeuronDB
userStories.description: Replace chrome.storage.local usage in popup with NeuronDB.
acceptanceCriteria: popup.js: Replace chrome.storage.local.get with NeuronDB.getConfig
popup.js: Replace chrome.storage.local.set with NeuronDB.setConfig
Remove chrome.storage.onChanged listener; replace with BroadcastChannel
Ensure idb.min.js and neuron-db.js are loaded in popup.html
Typecheck/lint passes

userStories.title: Migrate ThemeManager to use NeuronDB
userStories.description: Replace chrome.storage.local and localStorage usage in ThemeManager with NeuronDB.
acceptanceCriteria: theme-manager.js: Replace chrome.storage.local.get with NeuronDB.getPreference('theme')
theme-manager.js: Replace chrome.storage.local.set with NeuronDB.setPreference('theme', value)
Remove localStorage.setItem and localStorage.getItem calls
Replace chrome.storage.onChanged listener with BroadcastChannel subscription
Anti-FOUC: auto-init IIFE falls back to ThemeManager.getSystemTheme()
Typecheck/lint passes

userStories.title: Migrate NeuronUtils to use NeuronDB
userStories.description: Replace chrome.storage.local usage in NeuronUtils with NeuronDB.
acceptanceCriteria: neuron-utils.js: isScriptAtivo() reads config from NeuronDB.getConfig
neuron-utils.js: createStorageListener() uses BroadcastChannel instead of chrome.storage.onChanged
Ensure idb.min.js and neuron-db.js are loaded before neuron-utils.js in all contexts
All content scripts that depend on NeuronUtils continue to work
Typecheck/lint passes

userStories.title: Migrate module-factory.js to use NeuronDB

module-factory.js: Replace chrome.storage.onChanged with BroadcastChannel
Modules created via factory still activate/deactivate correctly

userStories.title: Update manifest.json and HTML files
userStories.description: Ensure all extension pages load IndexedDB dependencies and remove storage permission.
acceptanceCriteria: Verify idb.min.js and neuron-db.js are in all HTML pages that need them
Verify script load order: idb.min.js before neuron-db.js before consuming modules
Remove storage permission from manifest.json
Verify all web_accessible_resources and content_scripts entries are correct
Extension loads without errors

userStories.title: Remove all dead chrome.storage.local and localStorage code
userStories.description: Clean up any remaining references to chrome.storage.local and localStorage.
acceptanceCriteria: Zero occurrences of chrome.storage.local in codebase
Zero occurrences of chrome.storage.onChanged in codebase
Zero occurrences of localStorage.setItem or localStorage.getItem in codebase
Remove migrateFromChromeStorage() method in neuron-db.js
Remove needsMigration() method in neuron-db.js
Typecheck/lint passes
